          Button to stop the launched Isabelle solvers.
        • table

          Current slicing worker.

        • abbreviateChains
          JCheckBox abbreviateChains

        • doDeduplicateRuleApps

        • showRuleStatistics

        • sliceProofFixedPoint

          JPanel timings

        • totalBranches
          JLabel totalBranches
          Label showing total number of branches in the analyzed proof.
        • totalSteps
          JLabel totalSteps
          Label showing total number of steps in the analyzed proof.
        • updateGraphLabels
          boolean updateGraphLabels
          Indicates whether graph statistics (SlicingLeftPanel.graphNodes, SlicingLeftPanel.graphEdges) need to be updated based on SlicingLeftPanel.graphNodesNr and SlicingLeftPanel.graphEdgesNr.
        • updateGraphLabelsTimer
          Timer updateGraphLabelsTimer
          Timer to regularly update dependency graph statistics when loading a proof.
        • usefulBranches
          JLabel usefulBranches
          Label showing number of useful branches as determined by the analysis.
        • usefulSteps
          JLabel usefulSteps
          Label showing number of useful steps as determined by the analysis.
